calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-01-2006 Dismissal

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-11-2006 Continued To Jun-01-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:55am
April 6, 2006:
Judge Pro Tem Elliot A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Register of Action shows an ex parte application was filed to continue SCA hearing, but no new date was set before the SCA hearing of 4/5/06. Neither party was present by 10AM. Matter will be dismissed.

10:30am
April 7, 2006:
Clerk-Beth Wilber:Judge Pro Tem Elliot A. Myles will not dismiss the matter. Parties were apparently not clear that a new date had to be set before the matter could be continued. Judge Myles will issue an order continuing the matter, rather than dismissing it.
